channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Western Cape traffic enforcement week records 21 fatalities in 18 crashes amid widespread road safety violations
item.description: The Western Cape has reported a tragic week on its roads despite an intensified post-Easter traffic enforcement campaign aimed at reducing fatalities and improving driver compliance. Between 7 and 12 ...

item.title: Trump faces backlash after AI-generated religious-style image amid tensions with Pope Leo
item.description: United States President Donald Trump faced widespread criticism after posting an AI-generated image on his Truth Social account depicting himself in a Jesus-like or divine healer role. The image, whic...

item.title: Record six British acts inducted into Rock & Roll Hall of Fame 2026
item.description: A record number of British artists have been selected for induction into the Rock & Roll Hall of Fame in 2026, with six UK acts among the eight total inductees. The group of honourees includes Oasis, ...

item.title: NPA to proceed with prosecution over Life Esidimeni patient deaths
item.description: The National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) has confirmed its readiness to proceed with the prosecution of individuals implicated in the Life Esidimeni tragedy, one of South Africa’s most devastating pub...

item.title: Article discusses symbolic Xi–Kuomintang meeting and calls for peaceful cross-strait reunification
item.description: The article describes a reported high-level meeting in Beijing between Chinese Communist Party General Secretary Xi Jinping and Zheng Liwen, identified as Chair of the Kuomintang, portraying it as the...

item.title: B.C. court hears closing arguments in lawsuit over MAID access at faith-based hospital
item.description: Closing arguments have begun at the British Columbia Supreme Court in a significant legal case concerning access to medically assisted dying (MAID) in publicly funded, faith-based hospitals. The lawsu...

item.title: Australia names first female Chief of Army in historic appointment
item.description: Australia has announced a major reshuffle in its defence leadership, marking a historic milestone with the appointment of a woman to head its army for the first time in the country’s history. Lieutena...

item.title: Government moves to implement 33% women’s reservation in Parliament and state assemblies
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has stated that the government is moving ahead with the implementation of the long-pending 33% reservation for women in the Lok Sabha and state legislative assemblies, ali...

item.title: Parliament set to deliberate women's reservation implementation bills, says PM Modi
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi stated that India’s Parliament is on the verge of making history as it prepares to take up key bills aimed at implementing women’s reservation in legislatures. The propose...

item.title: US-Iran conflict escalation disrupted near-final nuclear deal and reshaped regional power dynamics
item.description: Yeh opinion piece ek intense geopolitical situation ko discuss karta hai jahan Iran aur United States ke darmiyan ek mumkin nuclear deal bilkul final stage par thi, lekin achanak military strikes ne s...

item.title: JD Vance faces scrutiny after diplomatic setbacks in Iran negotiations and involvement in Hungarian politics
item.description: The article analyses a difficult week for US Vice President JD Vance, suggesting his recent diplomatic and political engagements have backfired and raised questions about his influence within the Trum...

item.title: Delta community calls for government intervention over rising land dispute tensions
item.description: The people of Obitugbo community in Warri North Local Government Area of Delta State have raised an alarm over growing tension linked to a land dispute with a neighbouring community. According to comm...

item.title: Australians react to Harry and Meghan’s visit amid wider BBC coverage of major national stories
item.description: This BBC video page brings together several short news reports from Australia, covering a range of recent events and public reactions. One of the featured segments focuses on the visit of the Duke and...

item.title: Husband released without charges in ongoing investigation into American woman’s disappearance in the Bahamas
item.description: Brian Hooker, an American man whose wife Lynette Hooker disappeared while the couple was sailing in the Bahamas, has been released from custody without being charged, according to authorities. The cas...

item.title: Sara Duterte camp denies allegations of ouster plot and term-sharing deal
item.description: The camp of Vice President Sara Duterte has firmly denied allegations made by Ramil Madriaga, who claims to be a former aide and alleged bagman. Through her legal counsel Salvador Paolo Panelo Jr., Du...

item.title: Kahkewistahaw First Nation to receive new water treatment plant
item.description: A new water treatment facility is planned for the Kahkewistahaw First Nation, marking an important infrastructure development aimed at improving access to clean and reliable drinking water for the com...

item.title: New fossil reveals giant Ice Age echidna once lived in Victoria
item.description: A newly re-analysed fossil has revealed that a giant extinct echidna once lived in Victoria during the Ice Age, significantly expanding what is known about Australia’s prehistoric fauna. The species, ...

item.title: Inspection report highlights serious hygiene and security concerns at HMP Manchester
item.description: An inspection of HMP Manchester has raised significant concerns about conditions within the prison, pointing to serious hygiene failures and ongoing security issues. Inspectors reported the presence o...

item.title: TS Galaxy coach Adnan Beganovic attributes winless run to mental lapses after Kaizer Chiefs defeat
item.description: TS Galaxy head coach Adnan Beganovic has openly attributed his side’s poor league form to mental and psychological shortcomings following their ninth consecutive Betway Premiership match without a win...

item.title: Widespread loadshedding hits Punjab as supply-demand gap widens
item.description: Residents across Punjab province are facing severe loadshedding as distribution companies (Discos) struggle with a growing gap between electricity supply and demand. The situation is particularly crit...
